testsuite.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, find product with promotion, add extra voucher and apply
testcase.classname: should open website, find product with promotion, add extra voucher and apply

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, find Promotion printer and add it to Cart
testcase.classname: should open website, find Promotion printer and add it to Cart

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, add printer to cart and apply Amount based voucher
testcase.classname: should open website, add printer to cart and apply Amount based voucher

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, add printer to cart and apply Percentage based voucher
testcase.classname: should open website, add printer to cart and apply Percentage based voucher
